summary: Comprehensive testing of Accounting System features completed. All 33 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all accounting pages load correctly with proper data display. Complete flow tested: Party creation, Interest account, Interest calculation, Expense tracking, and Reports.
passed_tests: Party Ledger - Create party with opening balance (API + UI)
Party Ledger - Get all parties
Party Ledger - Get party by ID
Party Ledger - Update party details
Party Ledger - View party ledger with transactions
Cash Book - Add credit transaction (Jama)
Cash Book - Add debit transaction with UPI
Cash Book - Add debit transaction with Bank Transfer
Cash Book - Get cashbook for date with opening/closing balance
Cash Book - Get monthly cashbook summary
Cash Book - Delete transaction
Interest/Byaj - Create interest account for party
Interest/Byaj - Get all interest accounts
Interest/Byaj - Calculate interest using formula (P × R × Days) ÷ (365 × 100)
Interest/Byaj - Add calculated interest to cash book
Interest/Byaj - Party ledger shows interest entry
Expenses - Add expense with category and payment mode
Expenses - Expense auto-linked to cash book as debit
Expenses - Add expense with party
Expenses - Get expenses by month
Expenses - Get category-wise expense summary
Expenses - Delete expense
Reports - Profit/Loss statement with expense breakdown
Reports - Payment Mode breakdown (Cash/UPI/Bank)
Reports - Daily Cash Flow summary
Pay Salary - Create staff for salary test
Pay Salary - Mark attendance for salary calculation
Pay Salary - Auto-add salary to cash book and expenses
Pay Salary - Salary appears in expenses
Pay Salary - Duplicate salary payment blocked
All navigation tabs working (Dashboard, Staff, Attendance, Salary, Cash Book, Party Ledger, Byaj, Expenses, Reports)
UI - Add Entry modal in Cash Book
UI - Add Party modal with opening balance
critical_code_review_comments: All accounting APIs properly implemented with correct business logic
Interest formula correctly implemented: (Principal × Rate × Days) ÷ (365 × 100)
Auto-link feature working: Expenses auto-create debit entries in Cash Book
Party balance updates correctly on transactions
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing: TEST_Party_Accounting, TEST_Salary_Staff, UI_Test_Party. Cleanup performed for most test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All accounting features fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_accounting_system.py cover: Party CRUD, Cash Book transactions, Interest/Byaj calculation, Expenses with auto-link, Reports (P&L, Payment Mode, Daily Cash Flow), and Pay Salary auto-connect. Previous staff/attendance tests in /app/backend/tests/test_staff_attendance_app.py still valid.
